title: Plannerd 6.0
description: We diagnosed why Ola collapsed, identified the single priority to stabilise it in 12-18 months, built a three-vertical recovery strategy with specific actions, and defined the one trade-off Ola had to accept to survive.

title: Merger Alliance 3.0
description: Analyzed internal control and governance failures in Reliance Home Finance and proposed a debt-recovery and compliance reform framework to restore lender confidence and prevent future fraud.

title: Case Royale
description: A hypothetical brand story around the counterintuitive idea of a shoe designed to get wet without ever revealing the product using the dark ghost strategy to spark curiosity and conversation before the launch.

title: Launcher
description: A hypothetical brand story around the counterintuitive idea of a shoe designed to get wet without ever revealing the product using the dark ghost strategy to spark curiosity and conversation before the launch.

title: IIM Bangalore
description: Expanded the Sabyasachi fashion label into a wider segment of luxury interior design for HNIs using the brand's image as its synergy.

title: IIMersion
description: Decoded the Indigo crisis of December 2025 and suggested measures to recover customer retention and pilot workforce while abiding to DGCA guidlines.
